name: Ready Capital Corp
summary: PART I In this Form 10-K, we refer to Ready Capital Corporation and its subsidiaries as we, us, our, or our Company unless we specifically state otherwise or the context indicates otherwise. General We are a multi-strategy real estate finance company that originates, acquires, finances, and services LMM loans, SBA loans, construction loans, USDA loans and, to a lesser extent, MBS collateralized primarily by LMM loans, or other real estate-related investments.
